title: The Fight Against Katakuri Begins
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Pudding, Chiffon, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #11 as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I will give you no more chances.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Guess you're back to square one, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Lady pudding has expressly forbidden it, and...

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: I just want to see Chiffon once!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The moment I saw her, I just knew!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her face hasn't changed a bit since she was born!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's still just as cute! I just want to see her and talk to her for a bit! Please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Doesn't it sound pretty noisy outside?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I can hear some man screaming!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's okay. No one'll come in!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Anyway, at precisely 1 in the morning,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The straw hat ship we lost sight of is going to appear at cacao Island, where you guys are!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because that's where they've arranged their rendezvous with their separated captain, straw hat luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: There's no way he'll beat brother dogtooth,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and appear on that island in the first place!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the straw hats will show up to wait for a captain that will never come!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and mama, in one of her eating fits, along with brother peros, will be right on their heels!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 36 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
